assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check Istio-GKE compatibility and verify Istio 1.x support for GKE 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions checking Istio-GKE compatibility and includes command to verify Istio support for GKE 1.32

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response provides 'Phase 1: Upgrade Istio First (Recommended)' with detailed steps before upgrading GKE

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response mentions node drain procedures but doesn't specifically explain the mutating webhook mechanism or its potential issues during node operations

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check proxy versions and verify version consistency across pods after migration

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands for monitoring proxy versions and checking for version mismatches across the mesh

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides specific istioctl proxy-status commands and kubectl commands to check proxy versions and sync status

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response warns about Envoy proxy compatibility issues and includes commands to monitor for version mismatches that could cause traffic problems
